title: AHZNB's Naruto Chakra Addon
description: QOL Addon for AHZNB's Naruto Mod.
body:
<details>
<summary>Full Info</summary>

**This Mod is an Addon for AHZNB's Naruto mod.**

- **Added Chakra Charging**
  - This can only be used when your chakra bar is not full
  - When you wish to Charge Chakra press "X" which is the default button.
    - Chakra Charge will be active untill:
      a) You turn it off by pressing "X" again.
      b) Your Chakra bar fills up to max.
- **JutsuXP Scrolls**
  - Scrolls crafted from those useless learning scrolls you never pick up!
  - Holding learner in one hand and XP Scroll on the other and then holding Right click will activate the scroll giving the jutsu 1-100 Jutsu XP.
- **Quality of Life Features**
  - toggled with command /addonsettings
  - Ninja Start - Start as ninja as soon as possible
  - Starting Jutsu - Get that jutsu immediately
  - Keep Chakra - Dying isnt that bad, keep the chakra
  - Kekkei Genkai Reroll - You are not happy with your KKG?
    - Reroll once for free - /changekekkeigenkai for extra
</details>
